scripts.dev: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,green "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,green "pnpm run test:backend" "pnpm run test:frontend"
scripts.test:all: concurrently -n BE,FE,E2E -c cyan,green,blue "pnpm run test:backend" "pnpm run test:frontend" "pnpm run test:e2e"
scripts.test:coverage: concurrently -n BE,FE -c cyan,green "cd backend && pnpm vitest run --coverage" "cd frontend && pnpm test"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && pnpm install && cd ../frontend && pnpm install && cd ../e2e && pnpm install
